code.description: Stable snake_case code (unauthorized, executor_unreachable, stale_fence, scope_denied, audit_unavailable, ...).

retryable.description: May the caller re-send the SAME id after backoff.

audit_seq.description: Lake seq of the audit emission — the receipt; null only on unauthorized (the denial itself is audited separately for term.*).

kind.description: manager | dispatcher | control-plane | box-agent | tracker | library | console-api | edge | pty

liveness.description: Availability gates on THIS, never on target data freshness.

undo.description: Present when the op supports undo; the snackbar's undo fires this.
